name: Jupiter Mines Limited.
analysis: JMS has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2800, stop A$0.2525, target A$0.3627 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
